if.test: start_date != null and start_date != '' and end_date != null and end_date != ''
search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != null and search_text != ''

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id = #{member_id} AND TO_CHAR(penalty_day, 'YY/MM/DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YY/MM/DD')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM UNTACT_BOOK_BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_id IN
'${i}'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_BLACKLIST a, UNTACT_BOOK_PENALTY_SETTING b WHERE a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.member_id = #{member_id} AND a.penalty_day BETWEEN b.start_date and b.end_date

SELECT homepage_id, member_id, member_name, penalty_reason, TO_CHAR(penalty_day,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS penalty_day, penalty_register_ip, penalty_register_id FROM UNTACT_BOOK_BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
ORDER BY penalty_day DESC
